info.name: Crop Sown Catalogue Service
info.description: CRUD, search and import endpoints for the four crop-sown-registry catalogues (Planned Input, Actual Input, Sowing Details, Harvesting Details), one per tab of the Crop Sown Registry form.

body.raw:
{
  "Land ID": "RU/12/12/123/12345",
  "Plot Category": "Annual Crop",
  "Season": "Kiremt",
  "Crop": "Maize (Corn)",
  "Crop Category": "Cereals",
  "Crop Variety": "BH-660",
  "Cropping System": "Mono-cropping",
  "Planned Date (GC)": "07/17/2026",
  "Planned Date (EC)": "10/11/2018",
  "Average Growth Duration (days)": 45.0,
  "Planned Crop Area (ha)": 6.0,
  "Expected Yield (quintals)": 5.0,
  "Seed Type": "Local",
  "Seed Source": "Government / Woreda Agriculture Office",
  "Planned Seed Quantity (kg)": 80.0,
  "Planned Fertilizer Type": "Organic",
  "Planned Fertilizer Quantity (kg)": 50.0,
  "Planned Labor": 5,
  "Water Resources": [
    {
      "Water Resource": "Irrigation - Ground Water",
      "Method": "Sprinker",
      "Frequency": "Weekly"
    }
  ],
  "Cluster Farming Done Earlier": "No",
  "Surveyor Name": "Abebe Kebede",
  "Surveyor Mobile Number": "+251911000000",
  "Supervisor Name": "Sara Alemu",
  "Supervisor Mobile Number": "+251911000001",
  "First approvel status": "Pending"
}

variable.description: primary id returned by the create response
primary id returned by the create response

formdata.description: CSV or XLSX file to import (max 5MB). Column headers must match schema property names exactly.
